name: hk_2_6
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-01-20 across ROADSIDE stations compute and store: mean_no2_am (06:00-09:00), mean_no2_pm (18:00-21:00) (float), no2_difference (PM minus AM, float), higher_no2_period ('AM' or 'PM', str).

turns.query: Compare NO2 levels between 6:00-9:00 AM and 6:00-9:00 PM on January 20, 2025, across all roadside stations
